title: ZoktayCraft
description: Embark on an adventurous journey where you build splendid structures, automate farms, and explore the vast world around you.
body:
![ZoktayCraftLong](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8533a10fe524b3cb2961283b694a886a07b6244d.png) - **Embark on an adventurous journey where you build splendid structures, automate farms, and explore the vast world around you.** - My personal modpack, which I use on the server where I play with my friends. - **Is your ultimate goal when playing Minecraft to build magnificent structures? You’ll need tons of blocks and different block variants for that. So why not set up some factories to automate crafting? Sometimes building can get a bit repetitive, so it’s a great idea to switch things up with a bit of adventure!** - This modpack enhances the vanilla experience by adding new features without drastically changing the core game.
